rationale: The ensures' `*_unchanged*` predicates are per-run `forall|x|` with `pre_self_`-shaped triggers, so z3 instantiates them independently for post1_self_ and post2_self_ and never derives post1-vs-post2 pointwise equalities. Each `assert forall ... by { ... }` re-issues the forall under the same trigger and concludes the cross-run pointwise equality (containers' 7 tree/owned-proc fields, every proc, every non-`thread_ptr` thread), and the trailing scalar/`thread_ptr`-specific/dom-equality asserts give Verus the shape it needs to close `det_drop_endpoint_equal`'s map-extensionality goals on `container_perms@`/`process_perms@`/`thread_perms@`.
